title: AD Service Account Declaration
description: SACM v2 — Declarative definition for an on-prem Active Directory service account. Used by PowerShell provisioning scripts and drift detection.

name.description: Application short name without prefix. Combined with environment to form svc-{name}-{env}.

type.description: Account type identifier. Must be 'ad-service-account' for this schema.

ou_path.description: Full distinguished name of the target OU in AD.

groups.description: List of AD group distinguished names this account should be a member of.

technical_owner.description: Email of the technical owner responsible for the account.

business_owner.description: Email of the business owner accountable for the account.

delinea_folder_id.description: Delinea Secret Server folder ID for credential storage.
